intentSynonyms: update an env var in netlify
edit an env var in netlify
change the details of env var in netlify
modify an env var in netlify
update an environment variable in netlify
description: Replace an existing environment variable for a Netlify account. Replaces all values for the variable. Optionally scope to a specific site.

account_id.description: The account ID the variable belongs to

key.description: The environment variable key name to update

site_id.description: Optional site ID to scope to a specific site

scopes.description: Scopes where the variable is available (e.g. ["builds", "functions", "runtime"])

context_parameter.description: Branch name when context is branch-specific

values.description: New context-specific values for this variable

is_secret.description: Whether the variable value should be masked
